ddls:
CREATE TABLE "calendars" (
  "calendar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calendar */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the calendar */,
  "calendar_name" TEXT /* Name of the calendar */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the calendar */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the calendar */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the default calendar for the user */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the calendar for visual representation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the calendar was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the calendar was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calendar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calendars_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "calendar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calendar the event belongs to */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date and time of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date and time of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "is_all_day" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event is an all-day event */,
  "reminder_before" INTEGER /* Time before the event when the reminder should be sent (e.g., 30 minutes) */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event is recurring */,
  "recurring_pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of recurrence (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_calendar_id FOREIGN KEY ("calendar_id") REFERENCES calendars ("calendar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_invitations" (
  "invitation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invitation */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the invitation is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the invitation was sent to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invitation (e.g., pending, accepted, declined) */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time when the user responded to the invitation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the invitation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the invitation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invitation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_invitations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_invitations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the reminder is for */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date the reminder should be sent */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time the reminder should be sent */,
  "reminder_type" TEXT /* Type of reminder (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  "sent_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the reminder has been sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the reminder was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the reminder was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reminders_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the notification is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS, push notification) */,
  "sent_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role is assigned to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_calendars" (
  "calendar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monthly calendar */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the monthly calendar is for */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the monthly calendar is for */,
  "day_1" INTEGER /* Day 1 of the month */,
  "day_2" INTEGER /* Day 2 of the month */,
  "day_3" INTEGER /* Day 3 of the month */,
  "day_4" INTEGER /* Day 4 of the month */,
  "day_5" INTEGER /* Day 5 of the month */,
  "day_6" INTEGER /* Day 6 of the month */,
  "day_7" INTEGER /* Day 7 of the month */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the monthly calendar data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the monthly calendar data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calendar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weekly_calendars" (
  "calendar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weekly calendar */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the weekly calendar is for */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week the weekly calendar is for */,
  "day_1" INTEGER /* Day 1 of the week */,
  "day_2" INTEGER /* Day 2 of the week */,
  "day_3" INTEGER /* Day 3 of the week */,
  "day_4" INTEGER /* Day 4 of the week */,
  "day_5" INTEGER /* Day 5 of the week */,
  "day_6" INTEGER /* Day 6 of the week */,
  "day_7" INTEGER /* Day 7 of the week */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the weekly calendar data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the weekly calendar data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calendar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calendar_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the setting belongs to */,
  "calendar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calendar the setting is for */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calendar_settings_calendar_id FOREIGN KEY ("calendar_id") REFERENCES calendars ("calendar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calendar_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calendar_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "calendar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calendar being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the calendar is being shared with */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the shared calendar (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "shared_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the calendar was shared */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the share was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the share was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calendar_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calendar_shares_calendar_id FOREIGN KEY ("calendar_id") REFERENCES calendars ("calendar_id")
)
